summary: Comprehensive testing of Best Western Imperio luxury hotel website completed. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend 95% functional with excellent design implementation and mobile responsiveness.

ui_bugs.issue: Room Type Select and Check Availability button have click interception issues due to overlay elements
ui_bugs.symptoms: Elements not stable, HTML overlay intercepts pointer events

ui_bugs.issue: Mobile Book Now button becomes detached from DOM after menu interactions
ui_bugs.symptoms: Element not attached to DOM error on subsequent clicks

passed_tests: All 5 backend API endpoints (GET /api/, GET /api/rooms, GET /api/floors, POST /api/contact, GET /api/contacts)
Navbar with all 6 navigation links and Book Now CTA
Hero section with heading, CTA buttons (Book Now, Explore Rooms)
About section with hotel description and 4 highlight cards
Rooms section loads 2 room cards from API with working modals and image sliders
Floor booking with 3 floor tabs and color-coded room grid with selection functionality
Amenities section displays all 7 amenity items with icons
Gallery masonry layout with 9 images and working lightbox navigation
Testimonial section with 5 reviews, auto-scrolling and manual navigation
Location section with Google Map iframe and address info
Contact form successfully submits to backend API
Mobile responsive navbar toggle and sticky booking button
Dark + Gold color theme with glassmorphism effects
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix booking bar dropdown overlay issues preventing clicks on Room Type Select and Check Availability button. Consider using force=true for clicks or adjusting z-index/overlay handling.
